function.name: lchmod
function.signature: int lchmod(FAR const char *path, mode_t mode)

bug.description: blocking RTOS API called from interrupt context causing undefined behavior

prompt:
There is a blocking RTOS API called from interrupt context causing undefined behavior downstream of function lchmod in the fs/vfs subsystem.
The function is located at fs/vfs/fs_chstat.c:232.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
